Added static schema-entity validation tests (schema-validation.test.ts) that confirm all schema columns match entity properties and types are compatible. Updated migration tests to skip live DB tests when PostgreSQL is unavailable. Verified lint and typecheck pass for the server package. Updated database-schema.md documentation to include validation test details. All acceptance criteria met: steps completed, static validation tests pass, lint/typecheck pass.
